title: Crocodile Invites Vivi In
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on crocodile invites vivi in, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Crocodile Invites Vivi In. Crocodile toys with Vivi and the Straw Hats while his agents move the plan toward full civil war. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Such a pity... You've rendered my precious employees unable to work...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: In any case, I'd like to invite the princess to our organization's base but,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Would that be acceptable with you?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: A princess should never resort to such brutal behaviour, Ms. Wednesday.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I won't forget what you did to ignorant...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Was she the one who killed iGARAM!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Is it really something to lose your temper over?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: After all, how is it any different from what you did to my employees down there?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Your corpse shall dis-integrate to dust!

summary: This part develops crocodile invites vivi in and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
